description: Returns a combined summary of change order and invoicing information for a specific commitment contract (Purchase Order or Work Order).

data.description: Combined Contract Summary containing both change order and invoicing information

approved_change_total.description: The sum of all approved change orders' grand totals

pending_revised_change_total.description: The sum of all pending or revised change orders' grand totals

draft_change_total.description: The sum of all draft change orders' grand totals

total_invoices_amount.description: The amount of money billed on the contract to date

total_payments_amount.description: Sum of all contract payments for this contract

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code configured for the financial entity
